issues.name: neck and shoulder tension, especially during stressful periods

sessions.trappedEmotions:
Responsibility Overload — age 30
Frustration — age 25
Self-Criticism
Fear of Rejection — age 17
Heartache — age 22 (breakup)
Insecurity — age 8
sessions.insights:
Gallbladder meridian imbalance
Muscle tension pattern in upper body
sessions.limitingBeliefs:
I must put a lot of effort in and suffer to succeed
If I fail, I disappoint others
sessions.comments:
During this session, we focused on Ben's neck and shoulder tension, which intensifies during stressful periods, as well as his difficulty maintaining emotional closeness in relationships.

Through muscle testing, several trapped emotions were identified and released, including responsibility overload, frustration, and self-criticism — all of which appear to have contributed to chronic muscular tension in the neck and shoulder area.

We also explored deeper emotional patterns related to fear of rejection and heartache, which may be creating barriers to emotional intimacy in his relationships.

Recommended:
- Drink water and rest
- Light stretching for the neck and shoulders
- Observe emotional shifts over the next 24-72 hours

sessions.trappedEmotions:
Lost — age 20
Shock — age 40
Worry — age 40
Panic
sessions.comments:
During the session, Adam shared that he has been experiencing recurring headaches linked to feelings of self-doubt and emotional overwhelm. Through muscle testing, we identified several trapped emotions — including shock and panic — that appear connected to significant life events around age 40.

A crown chakra imbalance was also addressed. After releasing the identified emotions, Adam reported the headache intensity dropping significantly.

Recommended:
- Stay hydrated
- Rest and allow processing over the next 24–72 hours
- Journal any emotional shifts or memories that surface
